channel.title: Daily Summary on TzJ's Net
channel.description: Recent content in Daily Summary on TzJ's Net

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-04-14
item.description: The development of 5 core modules has been completed (support for high-definition datasets, tag mixing analysis, ARI stability testing, patch size experimentation, and integration of neighborhood query). 18GB of checkpoint data has been uploaded to the Athena server. The conflict issues in the TokenMonitor code have been resolved. The configuration issues related to gadgets and Rclone have also been addressed.

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-04-13
item.description: All the main tasks in all four projects have been completed: the draft MIHD paper, as well as the multi-modal fusion diagnostic solution; the upgrade of the dual audio transcription function of MeetingHelper; the error recovery benchmark architecture and the writing of the NeurIPS report; the bug fixing of the BOSS LeRobot system; in addition, research on the basic model related to batteries has also been completed.

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-04-12
item.description: 在这两个项目中，我们开发了一种高级研究流程：MIHD空间转录组学基准规划，以及与错误恢复相关的文档编制/故障排除工作。

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-04-11
item.description: 在四台设备上进行了高度复杂的技术工作：完成了BetterSSH整个项目的开发过程，优化了多项目开发的工具链，对MimicGen系统进行了深度重构以增强其功能，构建了NeurIPS学术写作框架，同时还扩展了对语音识别后端的支持。

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-04-10
item.description: Multi-project development day: Completed the writing of the MIHD benchmark test documentation. Fixed compatibility issues between MeetingHelper and various programs. Debugged LIBERO and battery management processes. Also implemented OpenClaw functionality, with no technical debt issues arising. Additionally, improved the pricing accuracy of TokenMonitor to better meet Claude Code’s requirements.

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-04-09
item.description: 此外，还通过添加具有时区感知功能的SSH处理机制，以及优化用户界面动画，来改进TokenMonitor的功能。

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-04-08
item.description: 已完成所有跨平台代码的优化与翻译工作，适用于HPC/机器人项目。已调试了三个机器学习数据处理流程，将翻译基础设施迁移到本地Ollama系统中。此外，还重新编写了机器人增强系统的工作原理，从动作回放模式转变为目标姿态执行模式。

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-04-07
item.description: 已修复了 website/update.sh 脚本中的4个错误问题，并且已经搭建好了完整的Hugo部署环境。现在，网站的更新流程已经恢复正常，所有步骤都已成功完成。此外，全面的日报/周报生成流程也已经启动起来了。

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-04-06
item.description: 已经完成了MIHD论文草稿中三个注释的规划和执行工作，其中包括对引言部分P1的修改，以及摘要和R5/R6部分的补充完善。在编辑文本的同时，还进行了三次新的跨切片查询实验；同时修复了HD Niche Query可视化界面中那些无法显示的查询点问题。

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-04-05
item.description: Linux FloatBall的架构重新设计，采用了固定窗口布局和GDK输入形状技术，有效解决了平台级别的几何问题。此外，我们还解决了两个主要问题：Life-Copilot Discord机器人的日志记录缺失问题，以及在使用MCP工具时出现的权限拒绝问题。

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-04-04
item.description: 每日人工智能对话总结

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-04-03
item.description: 每日人工智能对话总结

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-04-02
item.description: Daily AI Conversation Summaries

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-04-01
item.description: 每日人工智能对话总结

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-03-31
item.description: I have completed this week’s tasks: integrating the Leighton clustering algorithm, STHD benchmark data, conducting baseline tests on DLPFC, and evaluating HD multimodality. Currently, we have obtained important experimental data.

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-03-30
item.description: 我们已经完成了TedDY-G 400M模型的特征提取工作，并对多种策略进行了融合测试。这些测试是在11个DLPFC切片上进行的。此外，我们还撰写了第13周的报告，总结了上周的研究成果。

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-03-29
item.description: The TEDDY single-cell basic model has been analyzed on the HPC cluster. In the extraction script, four critical issues were resolved, and now the embedding process for the DLPFC dataset is successfully completed.

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-03-28
item.description: The debugging skills for cchypothesis have been improved, with the use of a more intelligent two-track troubleshooting method. Additionally, issues related to jitter in the TokenMonitor dashboard and window positioning have been resolved.

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-03-27
item.description: We have created a debugging technique based on hypothetical assumptions, and utilized this technique to solve the complex issue of the flashing interface of the TokenMonitor. In the solution, we used various placeholder elements such as tokens, URLs, file paths, and code identifiers.

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-03-26
item.description: 经过五次重要的迭代，我们系统地提升了ccplan的功能水平（包括提示校准、多意图分解、特征保护协议等）。我们还对TokenMonitor进行了全面的重构工作（文件分割、类型安全处理、缓存优化等）。在超过8次迭代的过程中，我们实现了并不断完善了float ball用户界面。此外，我们将成本计算功能迁移到了ccusage的命令行接口中。同时，我们也为贡献者提供了相关的架构文档支持。

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-03-25
item.description: 已经完成了三个与工具项目相关的架构改进：将研究模块的代码重构为7个模块；优化技能生态系统，使得全球范围内的技能配置数量从50种减少到28种；同时优化了1到4种语言的技能配置功能。此外，还实现了TokenMonitor跨平台适配工作：从仅适用于MacOS环境，发展到支持Windows/Linux/macOS平台。同时，还修复了1300多行代码中的漏洞问题。

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-03-24
item.description: 经过重构的Gadget汇总模块被拆分为8个独立的组成部分，共计72个测试案例。我们采用了纸质文档的方式来记录设计细节，并设计了3种使用Claude实现的方法。此外，我们还对TokenMonitor进行了全面的跨平台迁移规划，在初始实施过程中，共删除了350多行仅适用于macOS的代码。

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-03-23
item.description: The DCC HPC cluster has been initialized using the rclone synchronization technology. Additionally, relevant configurations have been completed on the GPU nodes. Currently, several issues encountered in the MIHD research project have been identified and documented.

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-03-22
item.description: 已经完成了W05-W12历史周报的批量生成工作，修复了网站部署过程中出现的关键问题（例如PaperMod主题的更新、update.sh脚本的优化）。同时重新设计了在Hugo框架下的工具部署架构，实现了统一的输出结果/站点预置区功能；改进了bugJournal下拉菜单的设计，并整合了基准测试报告的发布功能。

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-03-21
item.description: The development environment has been configured properly. The critical vulnerabilities in the summary generation process have been fixed. Support for Codex has been implemented, and all AI agents have been upgraded to Opus 4.6 version.

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-03-20
item.description: 在配备了gadget软件的MacBook上：批量生成了2026-03-19日的报告，对所有文档进行了全面更新和验证，以确保与代码库的一致性（修复了7处差异问题）。此外，还发现了并解决了rclone sync-all中的漏洞——由于缺少下载报告的记录，导致LLM调用次数过多。同时，通过执行git历史清理操作，删除了452个个人文件，总大小达94MB。利用rclone的同步功能，将仓库大小从22MB减少到了516KB。

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-03-19
item.description: We have conducted extensive research and development across various devices. Space transcriptomics alignment experiments revealed the trade-offs involved in semantic batch mixing. The robot error recovery process, from training optimization to portable deployment, has been validated through 139 tests. CalendarPro/Life Copilot achieves complete architectural restructuring, eliminating bottlenecks associated with single-intent classifiers while supporting the classification of multiple intentions. Additionally, we have expanded our comprehensive knowledge management infrastructure, including improved tools for analyzing long-text data. Yuke Zhu completed a comprehensive analysis of his academic career from 2012 to 2026, publishing over 100 papers and undergoing more than ten iterative analyses. Finally, we performed batch processing on the historical daily reports for the 30 days between February and March 2026.

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-03-18
item.description: In CalendarPro, a batch update feature has been added. This feature allows for the processing of multi-task status reports. This feature ensures comprehensive testing coverage, along with corresponding documentation explanations.

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-03-17
item.description: 在MIHD空间组学重构方面，我们实现了跨设备的协作机制；深入研究了QCVLA的潜在连接机制，并采用了基于FLARE的改进方案来处理问题。我们还解决了VLA训练/推理基础设施中存在的问题，同时生成了有缺陷的基准测试数据。此外，我们还提升了系统工具的性能。

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-03-16
item.description: The work on the embedding of essential models for space transcriptomics has been completed. A error recovery process was designed and implemented, resulting in a data reduction of 81%. Key flaws in the robosuite coordinate system were also fixed. Large-scale scenario generation tasks have been initiated. In collaboration with over 30 researchers, academic analysis tools have been systematically developed.

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-03-15
item.description: Full optimization of CalendarPro has been completed. A 7-stage parallel implementation plan was adopted (passed 230 tests). Various toolkits were integrated, allowing for the unification of paper retrieval, performance analysis, and citation information into a unified command-line interface. Shared tool code was extracted and stored in public folders or packaged to avoid writing over 400 lines of duplicate code. All output directories were organized into a structured hierarchical file system. Additionally, collaboration with 13 leading researchers in robotics/artificial intelligence led to the establishment of a systematic academic research tracking mechanism.

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-03-14
item.description: This is a GPU-based monitoring script that can be utilized in user interfaces, HDF5 data visualization tools, as well as the four-group progress prediction experiments involving the pi05 model. It is important to keep the fields marked with placeholders, such as token, URL, file path, and code identifiers, intact.

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-03-13
item.description: 我们开发了一种适用于学术研究的分析工具，该工具能够利用大型语言模型来进行轨迹分析，并且还具有奖项评定功能。此外，该系统还可以实现对RoboTwin Place双鞋任务操作进度的跟踪，是以每一帧为单位来进行的跟踪。在输出结果时，请保留所有占位符，如token、URL、文件路径以及代码标识符等。

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-03-12
item.description: We have resolved the issue with sandbox permissions for the macOS Wallpaper application. Additionally, problems related to PyTorch dependencies and CUDA compilation have been addressed. These improvements ensure the proper functioning of the deep learning evaluation environment.

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-03-11
item.description: Multi-project efficiency improvement: refactoring of MIHD files, optimization of K8s GPU monitoring tools, and optimization of VLA training processes (through improvements in the Torch/TorchVision library. The speed has been increased by 33% using JAX technology, while dependencies have also been optimized).

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-03-10
item.description: 在多个项目的开发过程中，需要进行一系列的文件整理工作、空间转录组学分析、机器人学习的优化，同时还要解决各个代码库之间存在的环境问题。这些任务贯穿了超过6个代码基础的全部开发过程。

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-03-09
item.description: Completed the core functions of MIHD spatial transcriptomics: cross-sample RM-IDEAL evaluation, CrossModalEnhancer for cross-modal enhancement, and scGPT literature research. Promoted several VLA/robot projects (UniVLA document processing, RoboTwin data conversion, process matching analysis). Implemented the MCP server-based tool for integration with CalendarPro, enhancing the multi-data-source support capabilities of research_scout.

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-03-08
item.description: 扩展的研究工具包括作者搜索功能以及更新的文档资料；能够生成错误分析的可视化结果；设计并实现了用于VLA训练的关键区域标注系统；同时修复了RoboTwin渲染基础设施中的一些问题。

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-03-07
item.description: Parallel operations were carried out on four devices: development of the MIHD documentation system and related research work for scGPT was completed. The FLARE/Phoenix training tools were also launched. Four evaluation issues related to BC-RNN were resolved. The wallpaper function for desktop video pages was implemented using WKWebView. Historical report data for February, spanning over 20 days, was generated in bulk. Development of the context-based intent classification feature in CalendarPro was also completed. Additionally, a complete scientific paper management system was built from scratch, featuring language configuration, reverse initialization, and duplicate removal capabilities.

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-03-06
item.description: 跨项目的合作工作包括了空间转录组数据的分析、对CalendarPro中错误的修复，以及完整的文档编制工作。此外，还涉及了与机器人学习相关的代码库的重构、Docker渲染堆栈的优化，以及Phoenix/FLARE训练流程的设计。其中，所有需要保留的占位符元素，如token、URL、文件路径和代码标识符，都需要注意处理。

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-03-05
item.description: Cross-device parallel development, including the use of MIHD spatial transcriptomics technology (through RM-IDEAL cross-sample comparison analysis, to reveal performance characteristics at various levels); improvements and updates to device toolkits (monthly summaries of updates and comprehensive guides to Claude code); debugging efforts on the VLA/Openpi-moe training process (resolved issues during curobo installation and defects in normalization processes). Additionally, a comprehensive upgrade was carried out to the CalendarPro personal assistant system, with 16 new functions added. A code audit was also conducted to identify bugs and implement mechanisms for handling risks.

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-03-04
item.description: 多项目研究与文档整理日：研究了QueST论文中用于空间转录组学分析的跨样本查询评估方法；改进了Desktop Video CLAUDE.md工具；编写了全面的zhaoganlong自我反思框架培训指南，并记录了相关细节信息。同时，将error_recovery_benchmark文档与实际代码库实现进行同步更新，包括流程架构的重新设计。

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-03-03
item.description: On the DCC platform, the implementation of the MIHD cross-sample RM-IDEAL benchmark test was completed (including design, 781 lines of script code, error fixing, visualization processing, and 459 lines of documentation). Additionally, data from 13 days of historical AI conversation logs was processed using a MacBook, resulting in structured daily reports. The BC-RNN/Pi0.5 evaluation process was also built, and some key model configuration issues were identified on the Tianhe platform. Finally, the interface was optimized, and relevant documentation for the website was prepared.

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-03-02
item.description: 我们已经识别出并修复了MIHD基准测试中的几个关键错误，这些问题是由于STAIG架构的局限性所导致的。此外，我们还解决了与macOS沙箱环境相关的权限问题。我们采用了基于安全标签的标记机制来处理这些問題。在GPU集群上进行了大规模的Pi0.5 VLA训练工作。另外，我们还编制了详细的外部依赖项清单，并诊断出了评估流程中存在的GPU使用瓶颈问题。

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-03-01
item.description: Cross-device work was extremely challenging: we completed the integration of the MIHD high-definition dataset and verified the multi-source annotations. We also carried out extensive refactoring of the large code base (cleaning over 250,000 lines of code). Additionally, we generated 28 historical daily reports and optimized the workflow. Meanwhile, we fixed vulnerabilities in the BC-RNN/Pi0.5 training process, enabling parallel training on 6 GPUs. Finally, version 4.1 of the desktop version was released, featuring improvements to the playback function and a redesigned Liquid Glass interface.

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-02-28
item.description: 每日人工智能对话总结：今天，我们讨论了与人工智能相关的主题。我们探讨了人工智能的潜在应用、现有的挑战以及未来发展的方向。大家都对人工智能的前景充满希望，但同时我们也认识到其中存在的潜在风险。接下来，我们将继续探索如何更好地利用人工智能技术，从而为人类社会带来更多的价值和便利。

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-02-27
item.description: In the Tianhe cluster, we conducted a thorough evaluation of the allocation of storage space and the guidelines for using Slurm. The results of the M14 benchmark test showed that the BC-RNN algorithm achieved a success rate of 0.28% (5 successes out of 1800 cases), while both Pi0 and Pi0.5 strategies failed to achieve any success. Interestingly, the random algorithm actually outperformed all other strategies, achieving a success rate of 0.0199. Out of the total of 649 instances where PickPlace errors occurred, failures were observed in every case, and the distribution showed significant deviations.

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-02-26
item.description: On the Tianjin supercomputer, we systematically studied the fundamental differences between the training and evaluation processes of Pi0.5/BC-RNN, and addressed these issues. Our evaluation framework has been extended to include 5 MimicGen tasks, and parallel training of BC-RNN image patterns has also begun. We also explored the infrastructure requirements for evaluating checkpoints of Pi0.5 between 10,000 and 100,000 steps. The LaTeX resume format was optimized for processing on MacBook computers.

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-02-23
item.description: Daily AI Dialogue Summary

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-02-22
item.description: 每日人工智能对话总结：

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-02-21
item.description: Daily AI Dialogue Summary:

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-02-20
item.description: 每日人工智能对话总结：

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-02-19
item.description: 每日人工智能对话总结：

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-02-18
item.description: 这项工作在DCC和天和这两台高性能计算机上进行。我们监测了MIHD多模态融合基准测试的结果（在坐标校正之后重新进行测试），并且研究了UNI/UNI2相关文献中的标准方法。与此同时，在天和服务器上，我们致力于为错误恢复基准测试建立统一的数据检查点管理系统，开发可视化脚本，并规划PickPlace VLA的训练路径。

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-02-17
item.description: Daily AI Dialogue Summary:

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-02-16
item.description: The comprehensive VLA integration process has been completed for the error recovery benchmark tests (versions 4.3 to 4.5). Successful diagnosis and analysis of the crashes in the MIHD clustering structure have been carried out. Additionally, a feature for generating dialogue summaries for daily device reports has been implemented.

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-02-15
item.description: 每日人工智能对话总结

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-02-14
item.description: 每日人工智能对话总结

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-02-13
item.description: Daily AI Conversation Summaries

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-02-12
item.description: MIHD项目计划实施六项改进措施：标准化处理、Q-Former算法、QueST集成以及配置结构的重构。相关的工作包括修订CLAUDE.md文件，详细记录各项改进方案，并开发相应的标准化工具。其中，需要保留的占位符包括token、URL、文件路径和代码标识符。

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-02-10
item.description: PCA+UNI+STAIG融合空间转录组学分析测试已经在DCC集群上进行了实施。目前，我们已经成功处理了11个切片中的7个切片的数据，并为所有切片生成了包含各种指标的可视化结果。其中，那些保留着占位符的token、URL、文件路径以及代码标识符的数据也已经被妥善处理并纳入到了分析结果中。

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-02-09
item.description: In the MIHD project’s clustering analysis and RM-Iideal visualization charts, a quantitative overlay layer has been added. Baseline tests and RM-Iideal evaluations were conducted on all DLPFC slices.

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-02-08
item.description: 每日人工智能对话总结

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-02-07
item.description: On the DCC HPC cluster, we have addressed three critical issues within the MIHD benchmark framework: errors encountered during SVD operations executed by mclust, performance problems during patch extraction, and alignment issues in STAIG’s strict mode. As a result, ARI’s score improved from 0.09 to 0.5435. Additionally, we have completed the initialization work for the QueST project’s documentation, and studied various aspects related to RM metrics.

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-02-06
item.description: The process for submitting public benchmark tests based on GitHub Pages has been implemented, and it is equipped with an interactive user consent mechanism. All placeholders that need to be retained, such as “token”, “URL”, file paths, and code identifiers, have been properly handled.

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-02-05
item.description: In the DCC cluster, we have addressed four key differences between the STAIG implementation and the original paper. We have fully implemented the end-to-end GCN+STAIG fusion module, and resolved all related vulnerabilities. Additionally, we have provided flexible gene preprocessing support. Through parameter comparisons, we identified the root causes of performance differences between MIHD and the original STAIG.

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-02-03
item.description: After discovering the partially completed experiment_log.md file and the missing PDF report, we have successfully generated a complete visualization and documentation for the MIHD benchmark test. All the placeholders, such as tokens, URLs, file paths, and code identifiers, have been properly handled.

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-02-02
item.description: We have investigated the differences in results obtained from the MIHD benchmark tests. The actual ARI score was approximately 0.45, while the recorded result was only 0.37.

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-02-01
item.description: The performance issues with STAIG ARI have been resolved. Now, the MIHD GCN implementation is consistent with the original STAIG. It has been determined that the root cause of the problem lies in an incorrect setting for the gene feature dimensions.

item.title: Bug Journal 2025-10-02
item.description: 在 AutoSeg-SAM2 项目中打开相关源文件，会话未实质展开
